_comment: Central registry of GPU hardware peaks used for roofline efficiency. Measured BW columns come from utils/hw_probe/mem_bw.c (random-init buffers; defeats Xe2 framebuffer compression). Spec columns are from Intel architecture docs / SKILL.md. AI* is the arithmetic-intensity threshold = peak_compute / peak_bw (ops per byte).

BMG.name: Intel Arc B580 (Battlemage, dGPU)
BMG.notes: PCIe Gen4 x8 ~13.6 GB/s host transfer. clpeak global-mem BW (1234 GB/s) is L2/L3 cached and is excluded per SKILL §4.

PTL.name: Intel Arc B390 (Panther Lake, iGPU)
PTL.notes: Host-shared LPDDR5x; effective GPU BW is ~86% of spec because the channel is shared with the CPU. cliloader misidentifies as PTL — same arch as PTL spec. bw_gbs_measured_read=105 is the streaming-read peak observed by INT4/INT8 weight-stream gemm_kernel on this rig; bw_gbs_measured_read_memcpy=94 is the conservative single-buffer memcpy number used by hw_probe.

LNL.name: Intel Arc 140V (Lunar Lake, iGPU)
LNL.notes: Spec only — not yet probed. Run utils/hw_probe/run_bmg.sh-style script on LNL host to fill in measured BW.
